creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 216868
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.20.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.20.0 and contains a few breaking changes to time series names along with a great many enhancements and bug fixes.

A full changelog can be found at https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.20.0

-David
